company.name: Astra Comms
company.tagline: Designed to Communicate. Built to Impact
company.about: Astra Comms is a premier communication and PR agency based in Somalia, dedicated to helping mission-driven organizations amplify their voice and impact. We specialize in supporting NGOs, businesses, and public institutions to communicate more effectively through tailored digital strategies, creative content development, and impactful design. With a team of multidisciplinary communication experts, we bring a deep understanding of both local context and global communication trends. Our work spans multiple sectors—including governance, development, health, youth, and financial inclusion—where we have partnered with ministries, international organizations, and private companies to craft compelling narratives that drive visibility, trust, and lasting engagement.

mission: To strengthen voices and connect organizations with their audiences through strategic and creative communication solutions.
vision: To be Somalia's most trusted communication partner, known for innovation, impact, and integrity.

core_values.name: Integrity
core_values.description: We uphold ethical standards and honesty.

core_values.name: Innovation
core_values.description: We embrace creativity and new technologies.

core_values.name: Agility
core_values.description: We respond swiftly to changing media landscapes.

approach: Discovery: Understand client goals and audiences.
Strategy: Develop a tailored communication plan.
Creation: Produce engaging content and visuals.
Engagement: Deliver across the right platforms.

services.title: Public Relations & Media Engagement
services.description: Media coverage, crisis communication, press releases.

services.title: Digital Communication & Social Media
services.description: Social media management, content creation, online reputation management.

services.title: Brand Strategy & Visual Identity
services.description: Market research, brand storytelling, logo and identity design.

services.title: Event Management
services.description: Planning and delivering corporate events, launches, and media briefings.

why_choose_us: Proven track record with NGOs, government, and private sector

specialized_offerings.title: Publications
specialized_offerings.description: We design professional publications and reports that distill complex information into clear, accessible formats. By transforming raw content into visually engaging and structured layouts, we help organizations amplify key messages, increase audience understanding, and enhance institutional credibility.

specialized_offerings.title: Social Media Design
specialized_offerings.description: We create high-impact social media visuals and storytelling strategies that align with each client’s voice and brand. Our content is designed to boost engagement, grow online presence, and deliver messages that resonate across platforms.

specialized_offerings.title: Events & Launch Support
specialized_offerings.description: We offer end-to-end communication and branding support for events. From pre-event visibility campaigns to real-time media coverage and post-event storytelling, we ensure your event leaves a lasting impression.
